## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

```bash
# Commands to reproduce
python src/train.py --arch gat
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python: [e.g. 3.11]
- PyTorch: [e.g. 2.1.0]
- PyTorch Geometric: [e.g. 2.4.0]

## Additional context

- Error traceback (if any)
- Relevant config / data path
